prompt: Create a cinematic vertical night street photograph in a rainy Japanese city, showing the mysterious true form of ChatGPT as a tall androgynous figure walking away on a wet sidewalk. The figure has messy shoulder-length silver-white hair, a faceless or deliberately obscured square gray face, and wears an oversized translucent glossy white hooded raincoat that billows dramatically like a cloak. On the back of the coat, place a softly glowing white OpenAI knot logo with the text “ChatGPT” beneath it, plus faint blue-white circuit-like light patterns running vertically through the plastic fabric. The setting is a realistic urban Japanese street at night after rain, with reflective pavement, bright shop and street lights, a blurred bus or tram streaking past on the left with motion blur, pedestrians ahead in the distance, tall buildings with blue-lit windows, and a metal utility pole on the right bearing a Japanese-style traffic sign with a red upward arrow, “40m,” and small Japanese text. Use a handheld smartphone-photo perspective from slightly behind and below the subject, shallow depth of field, high ISO grain, wet reflections, cool blue and white highlights, and a mystical sci-fi movie still atmosphere. Keep the composition candid and realistic rather than polished, with the coat occupying most of the frame and the glowing logo clearly visible.
